response.justification: Candidate brings 20 years of solid software engineering experience and demonstrated entrepreneurial drive through founding GISCollective, meeting baseline requirements. However, the role specifically requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—the candidate's AI work is limited to ~14 months of infrastructure and tooling at re:cinq with no prior AI product development. Additionally, the director-level strategic focus expected of a Principal Engineer role conflicts with a track record of individual contributor staff positions; there is no clear evidence of directing teams, strategic decision-making at scale, or advising enterprise customers on cutting-edge technologies.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded, infrastructure)
Entrepreneurial founder of GISCollective open-source platform, demonstrating innovation mindset and ability to build products from concept
Full-stack technical fluency with builder mentality; recent hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
concerns: AI expertise is recent (~14 months) and limited to infrastructure/tooling rather than strategic AI product development or demonstrated platforms; no prior significant AI background
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification); educational background does not include formal machine learning or AI training
No clear evidence of director-level strategic technical leadership; career shows individual contributor and staff roles rather than directing teams or setting strategic vision at scale
